algorithm: Token bucket or counter-based rate limiting using configurable numerator and denominator inputs
core_function: AXI4-Stream interface rate limiter controlling throughput via numerator and denominator parameters

interface.input: clk, rst, s_axis_tdata, s_axis_tkeep, s_axis_tvalid, s_axis_tlast, s_axis_tid, s_axis_tdest
interface.output: s_axis_tready, m_axis_tdata, m_axis_tkeep, m_axis_tvalid, m_axis_tlast, m_axis_tid, m_axis_tdest, m_axis_tuser

name: axis_rate_limit
